response.justification: Strong general software engineering and staff-level technical background with 17+ years of experience, but critically lacks the required 8+ years of production AI/GenAI development. Current role shows emerging expertise in AI infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) and existing TypeScript proficiency are relevant, but absence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, and deep AI/ML domain knowledge represents significant gaps for a staff-level GenAI role. Could be viable for mentorship track into AI, but not ready for immediate customer-facing AI leadership.
strengths: 17+ years of production software engineering with multiple staff-level roles demonstrates technical depth and leadership capability
Current role actively building AI infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks—directly relevant to job functions
Strong TypeScript expertise and teaching/mentoring track record align with product feedback and team development responsibilities
concerns: Only ~1 year of demonstrable AI/GenAI work versus the required minimum 8 years building production AI solutions
No Python experience mentioned despite being explicitly required; no vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization background documented
Previous 16 years of software engineering focus on general platforms (web, mobile, infrastructure) rather than AI/ML data pipelines or ML systems

key_factors.factor: Current AI infrastructure and agentic workflow work
